name: std-web-ui
description: Canonical std.web_ui.* package with web UI reducer contracts and device-effect helpers.
docs:
Canonical std.web_ui.* package with web UI reducer contracts and device-effect helpers.

This package defines the JSON-bytes contract helpers for browser hosts, deterministic replay, and the Forge M0 builder-I/O surface.

Modules:
- std.web_ui.schema
- std.web_ui.vdom
- std.web_ui.patch
- std.web_ui.runtime
- std.web_ui.trace
- std.web_ui.effects.http
- std.web_ui.effects.storage
- std.web_ui.effects.nav
- std.web_ui.effects.timer
- std.web_ui.effects.device.common
- std.web_ui.effects.device.permissions
- std.web_ui.effects.device.camera
- std.web_ui.effects.device.clipboard
- std.web_ui.effects.device.files
- std.web_ui.effects.device.blobs
- std.web_ui.effects.device.location
- std.web_ui.effects.device.notifications
- std.web_ui.effects.device.share
- std.web_ui.effects.device.events
- std.web_ui.test
- std.web_ui.tests

Usage:
- Add dependency: x07 pkg add std-web-ui@0.2.2 --sync
- Import std.web_ui.* modules.

Notes:
- Determinism: pure
- JSON boundary uses dispatch/frame envelopes.
- Binary device payloads stay in host-owned blob storage; reducers see manifests only.
- Device result paths are reserved under state.__x07_device.<family>.result.
